agent.chatModeDescription: Use this when you just want a quick search, a sentence translated, or a casual chat. In this mode, my responses are the fastest, making it ideal for light and instant communication.
agent.dataAnalysisDescription: Give me your data, and I can perform in-depth analysis and generate various data visualizations for you.
agent.description: To help you work more efficiently, I have several built-in operating modes:
agent.generalModeDescription: Hand me multi-step, complex tasks like writing plans, reports, or code. I will utilize the right tools to handle it for you from start to finish.
agent.sildeModeDescription: Provide me with a topic or an outline, and I can quickly create a well-structured and beautifully formatted presentation for you.
agent.summaryModeDescription: You can start recording anytime by clicking the button, or simply drop an existing audio file to me. Let me transcribe and organize it into a clear summary for you.
agent.title: 🤖 Multiple Intelligent Agents at Your Service

atButton.description: With just an @ symbol, instantly connect to any resource within your project! @ a file to analyze it directly, @ an agent for collaborative work, @ a plugin to extend capabilities, and @ a tool for efficient execution. Make all resources serve your task.
atButton.title: @ Instantly Call Anything with a Single Key

aiOptimization.description: I've already prepared a few one-click optimization options for you. Just choose any one, and I'll generate the corresponding command for you in the chatbox.
aiOptimization.title: ✨ Need some help to quickly optimize this file?

export.description: Effortlessly use your results anywhere. Choose to download the source file or directly export to common PDF and PPTX formats, ready for presentation, sharing, or archiving without any manual conversion.
export.title: 📥 Seamlessly Continue Your Next Steps

manualEdit.description: If you'd rather make changes yourself, you can always open the source file for the finest manual adjustments. After all, the final say is in your hands.
manualEdit.title: 🎨 Manual Editing, for Full Control Over the Details

mcp.description: Expand my capabilities with a rich library of plugins! Get started quickly with officially curated plugins, or create your own custom plugins for personalized functionality, truly making me your professional intelligent agent.
mcp.title: 🔌 Powerful Plugin Ecosystem (MCP)

modelSelector.description: Access a selection of industry-leading large models, each with its unique strengths! Choose the most suitable AI large model for your specific task to have professionals handle professional problems, achieving the best results.
modelSelector.title: 🧠 Top AI Large Models at Your Fingertips

multiThread.description: Start multiple conversation threads within the same project, with each thread focused on a different task. Want to work on copywriting and data analysis at the same time? No problem! Handle multiple topics in parallel and double your efficiency.
multiThread.title: 💬 Multi-Threaded Conversations, Parallel Processing

projectFile.description: A clear directory structure gives every file its place, enabling quick access and smart management to keep your project materials perfectly organized. Boost your work efficiency instantly.
projectFile.title: 📂 Project Files, Clear at a Glance

superMagic.description: Whether it's daily questions or complex tasks, just tell me what you want to do, and I'll provide you with professional solutions. Try it now!
superMagic.title: 👋 Hi, I'm $t(common:platform.name)!

uploadFile.description: Multiple ways, just as you like! Click to select local files, drag and drop them directly into the chatbox, or even copy and paste.
uploadFile.title: 📁 Upload Files with Ease

voiceInput.description: Don't want to type? Try clicking the [🎤] button to speak. It's super convenient for meetings or capturing inspiration
voiceInput.title: 🎤 Go Hands-Free, Just Speak

workspace.description: Each workspace is like a separate office, dedicated to handling a specific category of related work. This keeps different types of projects perfectly organized and free from clutter.
workspace.title: 📁 Create Your Own Dedicated Workspace
